The '''Second Battle of Champala''', also known as the '''Battle of Champala''', was a battle during the [[Imperial Skirmishes]] of [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] that saw [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], at the helm of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']], lead the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Third Fleet|Third]], [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|Fourth]], and [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleets]] to retake the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Champala/Legends|Champala]] from the [[Imperial Remnant]].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' first introduced the battle between Ackbar and Pellaeon as the Battle of Champala; however, ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' renamed the battle as the Second Battle, explaining that Pellaeon had initially captured Champala before clashing with Ackbar at the Second Battle.
